meta.title: Incident Command System for ICS (ICS4ICS)
meta.description:
Megan Samford of Rockwell Automation proposes that the Incident Command System approach that the federal, state and local governments use to address natural disasters, such as hurricanes, fires and floods, be adopted to provide a similar response capability for ICS cyber incidents.

She goes over the structure, framework (playbook), of the Incident Command System. How it works, and how the ICS community through a public / private partnership could use this same approach.

The idea of states and asset owners to effectively share resources, in a similar way as happens with fire departments and electric utility crews, could be a big win.

At 23:00 ... five tips to get you started.
